title: Journey Metadata
description: Schema for the generic journey-tier governance laws — laws shared by every multi-step journey (checkout, onboarding, wizards). A named journey opts in with journey.extends: [journey]; a named-journey law can supersede a generic journey law via refines (lex specialis).

$schema.description: Path to this JSON Schema for IDE validation and autocomplete.

scope.description: Scope code that prefixes every law id in this file (e.g. 'JRN').

description.description: What a journey is and what its shared laws govern.

triggers.description: Base keywords that resolve these laws for any journey-shaped task. The generator also unions in the keywords of every named journey that extends this tier.

title.description: Short human sentence naming the law.

statement.description: The binding text of the law.

severity.description: How hard the law pushes back. A named journey may refine this to a stricter severity.

appliesWhen.description: The trigger / jurisdiction. Common keys: scope, step.

status.description: Mark a law repealed: it stays in the authored YAML (its citation is retired, never reused) but is dropped from the generated governance index.
